archetype: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) mixed with Soft Editorial
design_philosophy: Creative, clean, editorial, Gen Z, professional, trustworthy. Minimal design with warm personality and elegant spacing. Strong editorial typography paired with soft organic shapes.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-[1.1] font-medium text-text_primary
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-text_primary
scale.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-primary

typography.rules: Headings must never use Inter or standard Sans. High contrast between massive elegant serif headings and soft, readable geometric sans body text.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24. Value negative space.

grid_modes.tetris: Use Mode A 'Tetris' grid for the 'What I do' section. Mix squares (col-span-4) and rectangles (col-span-8) with wide gaps (gap-8 or gap-12).
grid_modes.portfolio: Staggered 2-column grid or single-column oversized editorial image blocks to showcase case studies.

layout.border_radius: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl on cards and images to feel approachable and 'Gen Z'.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (surface or surface_secondary), 1px subtle border (border-border), no hard shadow. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) with ambient soft shadow (shadow-xl shadow-black/5).
surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/70, 1px bottom delicate border (border-border/50).

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling aesthetic. Sections should fade in gently.
motion.interactions: Staggered text reveals on headings. Image parallax inside cards. Hover effects should be slow and elegant (duration-300 to duration-500).

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) with px-8 py-4. Primary CTA uses bg-primary text-white hover:opacity-90. Secondary CTA uses border border-text_primary text-text_primary hover:bg-text_primary hover:text-white.
components.icons: Use lucide-react with thin stroke-width (1.5 or 1) to match the editorial elegance.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-contact-btn').

hero.title: Social Media Manager, Content Creator & Storytelling lover
hero.layout: Asymmetrical. Huge serif typography on one side, warm portrait on the other. Include 'Guarda i miei progetti' and 'Contattami' CTAs.

about.title: What I do
about.style: Bento grid with skill cards: Social Media Strategy, Content Creation, Community Management, Creator Relations, Digital Campaigns.

experience.title: Esperienza
experience.style: Elegant vertical timeline or massive list with hover image reveals. Items: Visit Italy, Ginecologia Fiorillo & Palese, Teatro Nazionale di Napoli, social.archie.

portfolio.title: Progetti in evidenza
portfolio.style: Large case study cards. Hover state should show 'View project' overlay (bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm).

services.title: Come posso aiutarti
services.style: Clean layout presenting service offerings. Warm, smart, direct copy.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.style: Massive footer CTA. Simple buttons linking to email, Instagram, LinkedIn.

case_study.layout: Editorial reading experience. Massive hero image, followed by grid sections for Overview, Goal, Role, Process, Content Examples, Results, Learnings.

hero_portrait.description: Warm editorial portrait of a creative woman, representing Martina in the Hero or About section.

project_visit_italy.description: Aerial view of Naples, Italy. Placeholder for 'Visit Italy' case study.

project_teatro.description: Ornate interior of a vintage theater. Placeholder for 'Teatro Nazionale di Napoli' case study.

project_ginecologia.description: Clean, soft aesthetic branding photo. Placeholder for 'Ginecologia Fiorillo & Palese'.

project_social_archie.description: Person holding a smartphone with social media. Placeholder for 'social.archie' project.

aesthetic_filler.description: Warm sunlight illuminating an Italian facade. Use for services or about section background textures.
